recommendations.title: Fireheart
recommendations.overview: The film explores the world of firefighters in 1920s New York City and tells the story of a 16-year-old girl who will have to become a hero in order to save her city.
recommendations.director: Laurent Zeitoun, Theodore Anthony Lee Ty

recommendations.title: Aqua Teen Hunger Force Colon Movie Film for Theaters
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Action, Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: An action epic that explores the origins of the Aqua Teen Hunger Force (better known as Master Shake, Frylock, and Meatwad,) who somehow become pitted in a battle over an immortal piece of exercise equipment.

recommendations.title: Help! I'm a Fish
recommendations.overview: Three children are accidentally transformed into fish after consuming a potion made by an eccentric scientist. The kids end up in the sea, with one problem: they must find and drink the antidote within 48 hours, or forever remain as fish.

recommendations.title: The Transformers: The Movie
recommendations.genres: Animation, Science Fiction, Action, Adventure, Family
recommendations.overview: The Autobots must stop a colossal planet-consuming robot who goes after the Autobot Matrix of Leadership. At the same time, they must defend themselves against an all-out attack from the Decepticons.

recommendations.title: The Swarm
recommendations.overview: A single mother breeds locusts as high-protein foods but has trouble getting them to reproduce until she finds they have a taste for blood.

recommendations.title: AquaSlash
recommendations.overview: Thrills, Chills and Screwball-Comedy meet Tiny Bikinis and G o R y  dismemberment in this Chlorine & Blood drenched Murder-Mystery.

recommendations.title: Clinical
recommendations.overview: A psychiatrist tries to put her life back together after a violent attack by seeking to repair the life of a new patient, but he has his own terrifying history.

recommendations.title: Maximum Ride
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Comedy, Fantasy, Science Fiction, Thriller
recommendations.overview: Six children genetically cross-bred with avian DNA, complete with wings, take flight around the country to discover their origins.

recommendations.title: The Chalk Line
recommendations.overview: After a couple finds a traumatized child of unknown origins, wife Paula must decipher the girl's strange behaviors to unlock her identity and dark past.

recommendations.title: The Benefactor
recommendations.overview: A newly married couple are forced to navigate the all-consuming interest of a powerful, mysterious, and possessive philanthropist.
